---
title: "TestRun"
output: pdf_document
---

#0. Set-Up

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(readr)
```

#I. Read In Data

```{r}
XLSXPath <- "RawDataTest/TestRunBradshaw.xlsx"

HerbOnlyDWR <- read_excel(XLSXPath, sheet = 1) #Herbaceous-Only Dry-Weight Rank
RegDWR <- read_excel(XLSXPath, sheet = 2) #Regular DWR
Freq <- read_excel(XLSXPath, sheet = 3) #Frequency
PGC <- read_excel(XLSXPath, sheet = 4) #Point Ground Cover
Cover <- read_excel(XLSXPath, sheet = "cover frequency (by quadrat) (c") #Canopy Cover-Frequency to be exact. Split between the PNF Gap protocol and the Tenth Acre protocol, so this will have to be broken down further.

#Reading all of the data into usable CSVs
write_csv(HerbOnlyDWR, "RawDataTest/HerbOnlyDWR.csv")
write_csv(RegDWR, "RawDataTest/RegDWR.csv")
write_csv(Freq, "RawDataTest/Freq.csv")
write_csv(PGC, "RawDataTest/PGC.csv")
write_csv(Cover, "RawDataTest/Cover.csv")
```
